Fix any of the following: Document does not have a non-empty <title> element
Selector: html
htmlcheck serious title-missing
Page is missing a <title> element
ibm serious page_title_exists
Missing <title> element in <head> element
Selector: /html[1]
ibm serious skip_main_exists
The page does not provide a way to quickly navigate to the main content (ARIA "main" landmark or a skip link)
Selector: /html[1]/body[1]
htmlcheck moderate landmark-main
No <main> landmark found
htmlcheck moderate landmark-nav
No <nav> landmark found
htmlcheck moderate skip-link
No skip-to-content link found
